name: nextsynergytech-atlas-backend
description: NextSynergy Tech frontend and backend connected to MongoDB Atlas

scripts.test:mongo: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose=require('mongoose'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI,{dbName:process.env.MONGO_DB_NAME||'Next_Synergy_Tech'}).then(()=>{console.log('✅ MongoDB Atlas connected to', mongoose.connection.name); process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error('❌', e.message); process.exit(1)})"
